Built on Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure

● Containerized & Portable
BoB runs inside a self-contained software container — like a portable lunchbox for your AI. Deploy it on any cloud, server, or machine without breaking or reconfiguring. Move it anytime.
● End-to-End Encrypted
Every message between you and BoB is encrypted in transit and at rest. That means no one — not even us — can read your conversations. Your data is locked with industry-standard encryption.
● Zero Data Sharing
We never sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers, partners, or AI training pipelines. What you share with BoB stays with BoB — period. No exceptions.
● Persistent Memory
● Deploy Anywhere

Core Capabilities

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

BoB is engineered to work like a co-founder — always informed, always available, always yours.

📦

Containerized Portability

Deploy BoB on any infrastructure — cloud, local server, or hybrid. Packaged in a self-contained environment that runs consistently wherever you need it. No vendor lock-in, ever.

🤖

24/7 Autonomy

BoB never clocks out. While you sleep, BoB handles queries, drafts responses, analyzes data, and keeps your workflows moving. Your AI co-founder doesn't even blink.

🔒

Secure Privacy

Your conversations, data, and business context stay yours — period. BoB never sells, shares, or exposes your information to third parties. Ironclad privacy by design.

🧠

Persistent Memory

Unlike other AI tools that reset every session, BoB remembers your business, preferences, and past conversations. Next day, next week — right where you left off.

⚡

Workflow Integration

Built to slot into your existing stack. BoB integrates with the tools you already use, handling automation, research, and decision support without disrupting your flow.

🚀

Instant Deployment

Get BoB running in minutes. No complex setup, no DevOps team required. Designed for entrepreneurs and business owners who want results, not configuration headaches.

Setup Process

Live in Minutes, Not Weeks

BoB is built for founders, not engineers. Here's all it takes.

01

Reserve Your Early Access Spot

Lock in your $9.99/month rate before prices go up. Early adopters get grandfathered pricing for life and priority onboarding support.

02

Tell BoB About Your Business

In your first session, walk BoB through your business context, goals, and workflows. He'll remember everything from that point forward — no re-explaining, ever.

03

Deploy to Your Workflow

Connect BoB to your preferred environment. He plugs into your existing setup and starts delivering value immediately — researching, drafting, analyzing, and automating.

04

BoB Gets Smarter With You

Every interaction makes BoB more valuable. He learns your preferences, communication style, and business nuances over time — growing into a true AI co-founder.

Questions & Answers

Got Questions?
BoB Has Answers.

Everything you need to know before joining the waitlist.

BoB is a containerized AI agent designed for entrepreneurs and business owners who need a smart, always-on assistant. Unlike generic AI chatbots that forget everything when you close the tab, BoB maintains persistent memory of your business context, goals, and past conversations — making every session smarter than the last. Think of him as a co-founder who never sleeps and always remembers.
Free AI tools are generic — they forget you the moment you close the chat, and your data often gets used to train their models. BoB is different. He remembers your business deeply, operates continuously, and your data is 100% private and never shared. The $9.99 early access price is less than most people spend on subscriptions they barely use — and BoB delivers measurable ROI from the very first week. One saved hour of work pays for an entire month.
Absolutely. Privacy is core to BoB's architecture, not an afterthought. Your conversations, business data, and information are never sold, never shared with third parties, and never used to train external AI models. BoB is containerized — meaning your data lives in an isolated environment built for your use only. We operate under a strict no-data-sharing policy, and this is backed by our Terms of Service.
It means when you talk to BoB on Monday and come back on Friday, he knows exactly who you are, what your business does, what you discussed, and where you left off. No re-introductions. No repeating yourself. You build on previous conversations instead of starting over — making BoB exponentially more useful over time. This is the single biggest differentiator from every other AI tool on the market.
Containerization means BoB is packaged in a self-contained environment that can run anywhere — your cloud, a local server, or a hybrid setup — without breaking. For you, that means BoB is portable, consistent, and not locked to a single platform. If you ever want to move providers or scale up, BoB comes with you. No starting over, no vendor dependency.
Not at all. BoB is designed specifically for non-technical entrepreneurs and business owners. Our onboarding process walks you through everything step-by-step. Early access members get priority onboarding support and direct access to our founder team. If you can use email, you can use BoB.
Your rate is locked in for life. When standard pricing goes to $29.99/month, your subscription stays at $9.99/month — forever, for as long as you remain subscribed. This is our commitment to early believers who help build BoB from the ground up. That's a $240/year difference that compounds year after year.
Yes, cancel anytime with no penalties, no contracts, and no questions asked. We believe if BoB isn't delivering real value to your business, you shouldn't pay for it. That said, most users who give BoB 30 days find they can't imagine working without him.
Early access members are onboarded in priority order. After reserving, you'll receive a confirmation email with your queue position and an estimated access date. Our team will reach out personally to walk you through setup. We're rolling out in stages to ensure every early member gets the full-attention onboarding they deserve.
